examples: Some of the Adele penguin colonies have already gone extinct.
Adele is now, finally, spending more time with his three daughters.
Adele, who performed during the awards, arrived in a short black cocktail dress.
Two passers-by, who restrained Latchana until police arrived, were commended by the judge, Adele Williams.
Of the popular musicians today, Mr. Alpert is particularly impressed with the singer Adele.
